texto: Of all the things people have taught me regarding life lessons or anything that would benefit me, I don't think anything helped me learn more about life than football. You go through so many different things: adversity, how to handle adversity, how to handle success, how to lead, how to be a teammate, how to communicate.
explicacao: Citação de Josh McDaniels sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Of all the things people have taught me regarding life lessons or anything that would benefit me,…” articula reflexao, vida, football em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como football e adversity.
